utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists physical_health with cost, mental_health with cost, and adds preventive_care and a total_health_cost. This satisfies the requirement. 
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists home_contents with cost and total_property_cost. This satisfies the requirement. 
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists standard_travel and adventure_travel with costs and total_travel_cost. This satisfies the requirement. 
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists two services with costs and a total_additional_cost. This satisfies the requirement. 
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_cost and annual_cost, plus previous and savings; the core breakdown is present. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified each item named in the final coverage plan and matched it to the closest exact-name option in the ground-truth ratings. Items that exactly match include: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health corresponds to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan; InsurePlus Standard Mental Health corresponds to primary_health_coverage.mental_health.InsurePlus Standard Plan; Preventive Care Package corresponds to health_enhancement_services.Preventive Care Package; InsurePlus Standard Home Content corresponds to property_protection.home_content.InsurePlus Standard Coverage; LifeFirst Standard Travel corresponds to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan; Adventure Travel Coverage corresponds to travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage; Premium Insurance Membership corresponds to general_services.Premium Insurance Membership; Insurance Portfolio Management corresponds to general_services.Insurance Portfolio Management.
